# Copilot Connector Ledger MCP

Paid remote MCP for Copilot Studio connector permission audits, drift scans, owner signoff receipts, and compliance export packs.

Website: https://copilotconnectorledger.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://copilotconnectorledger.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://copilotconnectorledger.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/copilot-connector-ledger-mcp

Use case: Audit Copilot Studio connector permissions before agents inherit risky scopes.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_connector_permission_risk, scan_connector_drift, request_owner_signoff, generate_audit_pack, export_connector_receipt
